signals.headline: Kerala Assembly Election Status:**
signals.raw:
Kerala Assembly Election Status:**
The 2026 Kerala Assembly elections were held on April 9, 2026[3], with vote counting scheduled for May 4[3]. Since today is April 18, the votes have not yet been counted, so final results have not been confirmed or announced.

signals.headline: Current Campaign Activity:**

Current Campaign Activity:**
The election campaign has concluded, with Union Home Minister Amit Shah and other leaders from the Left Democratic Front (LDF), United Democratic Front (UDF), and National Democratic Alliance (NDA) having campaigned intensively[4]. Thrissur is emerging as a key battleground with a three-cornered contest[4].

signals.headline: US-Iran Peace Talks in Pakistan Collapse After 21 Hours; Vance Announces Failure with Kushner and Witkoff at Side | NO |
signals.raw:
US-Iran Peace Talks in Pakistan Collapse After 21 Hours; Vance Announces Failure with Kushner and Witkoff at Side | NO | HIGH confidence**[1][2][4]

Recent reports confirm the breakdown of marathon US-Iran negotiations in Islamabad on April 11-12, 2026, led by Vice President JD Vance alongside Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff, with Vance stating Iran rejected US terms demanding capitulation.[2][4]
